prestazioni: Engine swap to a **SR20DET Red Top (Code: SR20DET)** with forged internals: **JE 87mm forged pistons (9.0:1 CR)**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, **Crower billet crankshaft**, and **ARP head studs** for 500+ HP reliability. Paired with a **Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer)** on a **custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold (Tomei or HKS)** with **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **Tial Q 50mm BOV**.

Fuel system overhaul: **Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump**, **ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min)**, **Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator**, and **AEM 340LPH external pump** for E85 compatibility. **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with **custom SR20DET base map** tuned on a **Dynapack hub dyno** for precise load-holding calibration.

Drivetrain and handling: **OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way, 1.5/2.0 bias ratio)** in a **Nismo 5-speed transmission (Code: FS5W71C)** with **PPG straight-cut gears (1st: 3.321, 2nd: 2.077, 3rd: 1.308)**. **Polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension full kit)** and **Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV, 8/18kg spring rates)** with **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear)** and **Nismo 4.11:1 R200 differential** for drag-strip launches.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (S13-specific, 3-piece overfenders)** with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (Seibon)** and **Voltex Type-3 rear wing (1700mm, 3D endplates)**. **Work Meister S1 3P 17x9.5 +22 (front) and 17x10.5 +30 (rear)** wheels wrapped in **Toyo R888R 245/40/17 (front) and 275/35/17 (rear)** tires.

**Custom Nissan Nismo R34 GT-R Bayside Blue (B22) paint** with **3M Matte Black vinyl roof wrap** and **JDM-spec Nismo S13 badges (red/white)**. **Recaro SP-G (Kazuki spec) seats** in **black Alcantara with red stitching**, **Nismo 350mm steering wheel (suede)**, and **Defi BF Silver gauges (oil pressure, boost, wideband)** mounted in a **custom carbon fiber gauge pod (Raceseng)**.

**Full interior cage (Custom Cages UK, 8-point, bolt-in)** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses (ASM2)** and **Sparco fireproof racing seats (Pro ADV)**. **Custom aluminum pedal set (NRG)** and **Momo Prototipo shift knob (short throw)**. **LED taillight conversion (JDM S14 Type II)** with **custom sequential turn signals (Diode Dynamics)** and **Morimoto XB LED headlights (HID projector retrofit)**.
